defs: Any one of several species of large marine gastropods belonging to the genus Yetus, or Cymba; a boat shell.

records.ety: [OE. yet, et, it, AS. git, gyt, giet, gieta; akin to OFries. ieta, eta, ita, MHG. iezuo, ieze, now, G. jetzo, jetzt.]

defs: In addition; further; besides; over and above; still.
quotes: This furnishes us with yet one more reason why our savior, lays such a particular stress acts of mercy.
The rapine is made yet blacker by the pretense of piety and justice.

defs: At the same time; by continuance from a former state; still.
quotes: Facts they had heard while they were yet heathens.

defs: Up to the present time; thus far; hitherto; until now; -- and with the negative, not yet, not up to the present time; not as soon as now; as, Is it time to go? Not yet. See As yet, under As, conj.
quotes: Ne never yet no villainy ne said.

defs: Before some future time; before the end; eventually; in time.

quotes: Men may not too rashly believe the confessions of witches, nor yet the evidence against them.
Yet I say unto you, That even Solomon in all his glory was not arrayed like one of these.
